ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly readable. ICC Certificate of Origin with standard EU format.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly readable. Single-page commercial invoice with full product specification.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate contains Order No: 19753 and Invoice reference 111459, but no LC/L/C/Letter of Credit/Documentary Credit reference is present.

occurrences_in_invoice_files.location: Invoice header/company branding at top of page
occurrences_in_invoice_files.context: Company logo/name branding in the invoice header, alongside address 'Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG'

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'Forest Papper AB' found in invoice header as the invoice issuer's company branding.

pairing_validation.details: Certificate references invoice 111459 which matches invoice no 111459 in the invoice. Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' is the invoice issuer. Consignee 'BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.' matches both Buyer and Delivery address in the invoice. All three pairing criteria are met.

candidates.raw_text: BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.
candidates.normalized_text: barem amb. san. ve tic. a.s.

candidates.raw_text: IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
candidates.normalized_text: ibni melek osb mah. tosbi yol. 4 sokak no: 14, izmir, turkey

candidates.raw_text: IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
candidates.normalized_text: ibni melek osb mah. tosbi yol. 4 sokak no: 14, izmir, turkey
SE prefix in VAT number indicates Sweden
SE prefix in IBAN indicates Sweden

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: FOREST PAPPER AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG, VAT no: SE556878121401

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: The consignor name 'Forest Papper AB' is found in the invoice header as 'FOREST PAPPER AB' — the invoice issuer's company branding. This is an exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Verify consignor country Sweden against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states country SWEDEN. Invoice header contains VAT no: SE556878121401 where SE prefix verifies Sweden. IBAN SE08 also confirms Sweden. Address 'GÖTEBORG' is in Sweden. Country verified.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice header/branding
Land verification via indirect identifiers – SE prefix in VAT number

normalizations_used: Case normalization: 'Forest Papper AB' vs 'FOREST PAPPER AB'
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN'. Invoice issuer (header branding): 'FOREST PAPPER AB' at 'Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG'. Company name matches exactly after case normalization. Country Sweden verified via SE-prefix in VAT number SE556878121401 and IBAN SE08. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH — no need to proceed to sequential testing 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S., IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S., IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY (Buyer field)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains a 'Buyer' field with 'BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S.' — this is the primary factoring field per 4.2.0.2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice buyer name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.' vs Invoice Buyer: 'BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S.'. After normalization of spaces around periods, both names are identical: 'barem amb.san.ve tic.a.s.' The difference is only extra spaces after periods in the certificate which is standard formatting variation.
Certificate: TURKEY. Invoice Buyer address: TURKEY. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Buyer field is primary billing field
Name verification with normalization of spaces

normalizations_used: Space normalization: 'AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.' → 'AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S.' (extra spaces after periods removed)
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.' in IZMIR, TURKEY. Invoice Buyer: 'BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S.' in IZMIR, TURKEY. The only difference is spacing after periods in the company name abbreviations (SAN. vs SAN., VE vs VE, TIC. vs TIC.). After normalization of extra spaces these are identical. Country TURKEY matches exactly. MATCH per 4.2.4.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: 37 Packages White Testliner; Invoice Date and Number : 16.01.2026 / 111459
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Description of Goods: WHITE TESTLINER; Invoice no: 111459; Invoice date: 2026-01-16

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (like part numbers or SKUs). The certificate contains an order number (19753) and invoice number (111459) but no article-level identifiers.

comparison_steps.description: Identify and match the identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'White Testliner'. Invoice Description of Goods: 'WHITE TESTLINER'. After case normalization: 'white testliner' = 'white testliner'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Verify invoice reference in certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'Invoice Date and Number : 16.01.2026 / 111459'. Invoice states Invoice no: 111459, Invoice date: 2026-01-16. Invoice number 111459 matches exactly. Date: certificate 16.01.2026 (DD.MM.YYYY) = invoice 2026-01-16 (YYYY-MM-DD) = January 16, 2026. Same date, different format. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'White Testliner' matches 'WHITE TESTLINER'
Invoice reference verification – invoice number and date match

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: '37 Packages White Testliner'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'White Testliner'. Invoice Description of Goods: 'WHITE TESTLINER'. After case normalization both are 'white testliner' — exact match. Additional text '37 Packages' in certificate is a non-identity-bearing packaging/quantity notation per 4.3.4. Invoice reference: certificate states '16.01.2026 / 111459', invoice states invoice no 111459 dated 2026-01-16. Both match after date format normalization. MATCH.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: 47802 KG (Box 7); Gross and Net Weight : 47802 KG (Box 6)
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Total Quantity 47,802 (with row quantities in MT: 5.374 + 5.748 + 17.84 + 15.322 + 3.518 = 47.802 MT)

comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains '47802 KG'. This is the verification-base quantity per 4.4.2.1. Box 6 also states 'Gross and Net Weight : 47802 KG' which is consistent.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 47802 can be directly identified in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice states 'Total Quantity 47,802'. After thousands separator normalization (comma as thousands separator per 4.4.3.3): 47,802 → 47802. The value 47802 is directly identifiable in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that comma is being used as thousands separator, not decimal separator
comparison_steps.details: The invoice row quantities are in MT: 5.374 + 5.748 + 17.84 + 15.322 + 3.518 = 47.802 MT. Converting 47.802 MT to KG: 47.802 × 1000 = 47802 KG. This confirms that 'Total Quantity 47,802' uses comma as thousands separator (47,802 = 47802), not as decimal separator. The value is an integer consistent with KG.
Invoice rows sum to 47.802 MT. 47.802 MT × 1000 = 47802 KG. Certificate states 47802 KG. Exact match after 3B conversion. This confirms the direct identification in the previous step.

rules_applied.description: Direct identification – 47802 found in invoice as Total Quantity 47,802
Thousands separator normalization – comma treated as thousands separator
Exception 3B – MT↔KG conversion confirms: 47.802 MT = 47802 KG

normalizations_used: Thousands separator normalization: 47,802 → 47802 (comma as thousands separator per 4.4.3.3)
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '47802 KG'. Certificate Box 6: 'Gross and Net Weight : 47802 KG'. Invoice: 'Total Quantity 47,802'. The comma in 47,802 is a thousands separator (not decimal) — confirmed by: (1) invoice row quantities in MT sum to 47.802 MT, which equals 47802 KG; (2) the value 47802 as integer is consistent with KG measurement. After thousands separator normalization per 4.4.3.3, the invoice value 47802 matches the certificate value 47802 exactly. Additionally, the certificate states 'Gross and Net Weight' meaning GW=NW=47802 KG. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 47,802 in invoice could be a decimal value (47.802)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: If 47,802 were a decimal (47.802), it would represent 47.802 units. The unit column shows MT for individual rows. 47.802 MT = 47802 KG which matches the certificate. Either interpretation leads to the same conclusion. However, context confirms it's 47802 as integer (thousands separator) since it's labeled 'Total Quantity' without a unit specifier, matching the sum of row quantities.

comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains 'Goods origin Germany' — this is an explicit origin field.
Certificate Box 3: 'Germany'. Invoice: 'Goods origin Germany'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via 'Goods origin' field
MATCH – origin 'Germany' explicitly identified in invoice

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 (Country of origin): 'Germany'. Invoice field 'Goods origin': 'Germany'. Exact textual match. Note: The certificate consignor is in Sweden and origin is Germany — this is valid per 4.5 (origin refers to where goods are produced, not where consignor is located). Single origin country, no mixed origins issue. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate.
Document A is a single-page certificate. Document B is a single-page invoice. No multi-document complexity.
All three criteria met: invoice number 111459 matches, consignor Forest Papper AB is invoice issuer, consignee BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S. is invoice buyer.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' found as 'FOREST PAPPER AB' in invoice header. Direct match as invoice issuer.
Sweden verified via SE prefix in VAT number SE556878121401 and IBAN SE08.
Buyer field identified as primary billing field. BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S. in Buyer field.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching of identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'White Testliner' matches 'WHITE TESTLINER' after case normalization.
Invoice number 111459 and date 16.01.2026 match invoice no 111459 dated 2026-01-16.
47802 found in invoice as 'Total Quantity 47,802' after thousands separator normalization.
Comma in 47,802 treated as thousands separator. Value is integer 47802.
Cross-verification: 47.802 MT × 1000 = 47802 KG. Confirms direct identification.
'Goods origin Germany' found as explicit origin field in invoice.
Germany in certificate matches Germany in invoice. Exact match.

evidence.description: Invoice issuer company name in header
Invoice VAT number with SE prefix
Consignee name and address in certificate
evidence.raw_text: BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S. IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14 IZMIR TURKEY

evidence.description: Buyer name and address in invoice
evidence.raw_text: BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S. IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14 IZMIR TURKEY

evidence.description: Gross and Net Weight in certificate Box 6

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Forest Papper AB, mottagaren Barem Amb. San. Ve Tic. A.S. i Turkiet, varubeskrivningen White Testliner, vikten 47 802 kg och ursprungslandet Tyskland kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Forest Papper AB matches invoice issuer. Consignee BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S. matches invoice buyer. Goods description 'White Testliner' matches. Quantity 47802 KG verified against Total Quantity 47,802 (thousands separator normalization) and confirmed by MT→KG conversion of row totals. Country of origin Germany matches exactly.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: FOREST PAPPER AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG, VAT no: SE556878121401
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor identifierad i fakturans sidhuvud
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Forest Papper AB' återfinns som 'FOREST PAPPER AB' i fakturans sidhuvud (företagets varumärke/logotyp). Exakt namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler. Landet Sverige verifierat via SE-prefix i momsnummer SE556878121401.

sections.certificate_value: BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S., IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
sections.invoice_value: BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S., IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.' identifieras i fakturans köparfält (Buyer) som 'BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S.'. Enda skillnaden är extra mellanslag efter punkter i förkortningarna, vilket är tillåten normalisering. Adress och land (TURKEY) matchar exakt.

sections.certificate_value: 37 Packages White Testliner; Invoice Date and Number : 16.01.2026 / 111459
sections.invoice_value: Description of Goods: WHITE TESTLINER; Invoice no: 111459; Invoice date: 2026-01-16
sections.motivation: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'White Testliner' i certifikatet matchar 'WHITE TESTLINER' i fakturan efter normalisering av versaler. Fakturanummer 111459 och datum 16.01.2026 i certifikatet matchar fakturans uppgifter (111459, 2026-01-16) efter datumformatnormalisering.

sections.certificate_value: 47802 KG (Box 7); Gross and Net Weight : 47802 KG (Box 6)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 47802 KG (Box 7) kan identifieras i fakturan som 'Total Quantity 47,802' efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (komma). Korsverifiering: fakturans radkvantiteter summerar till 47,802 MT (5,374 + 5,748 + 17,84 + 15,322 + 3,518), vilket omräknat via 3B (1 MT = 1000 KG) ger exakt 47802 KG. Certifikatet anger 'Gross and Net Weight', dvs brutto = netto = 47802 KG.
Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Germany' (Box 3) matchar fakturans 'Goods origin Germany' exakt. Enskilt ursprungsland, inga blandade ursprung.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints evaluated and verified as MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.95. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH statuses. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No confidence values below 0.85 threshold.
